{{CargoRelic
|name=Bronze Big Bird Head
|class_id=20083
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=It was excavated in the Sanxingdui ritual pit II and is the largest of all the bird-shaped artifacts in the Sanxingdui. It may have been a decorative object on a temple or mounted on top of some object as a symbol for ceremonial purposes.
|fame=15
|art=10
|fth=19
|civ=29
|tech=17
|ss1=Per 5 Orange Museum Promos, Snail RUSH +5<br>Orange Museum Promos: 50/50
|ss2=Per 5 Orange Museum Promos, Snail RUSH +10<br>Orange Museum Promos: 50/50
|ss3=Per 5 Orange Museum Promos, Snail RUSH +15<br>Orange Museum Promos: 50/50
|ss4=Per 5 Orange Museum Promos, Snail RUSH +15<br>Orange Museum Promos: 50/50
|ss7=Per 5 Orange Museum Promos, Snail RUSH +15<br>Orange Museum Promos: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
